info.title: OpenClockwork API
info.description: Self-hostable working-time tracker — REST + WebSocket surface.

refreshToken.description: A refresh token previously returned from /auth/login or /auth/refresh.

password.description: Initial password — bcrypt-hashed on the server.

startDate.description: ISO date when the employee starts; Soll-Stunden are counted from here.

bundesland.description: ISO-3166-2 code of the German state — drives the holiday calendar.

weekdays.description: Bitmask: Mon=1, Tue=2, Wed=4, Thu=8, Fri=16, Sat=32, Sun=64. Mo–Fr = 31.

workingDays.description: Working-day bitmask. Mon=1, Tue=2, …, Sun=64. Mo–Fr = 31, Mo–Sa = 63.

adjustmentDays.description: Signed adjustment days (e.g. half-year entry pro-rata).

halfDayStart.description: Take the first day as a half-day

halfDayEnd.description: Take the last day as a half-day
